title: CT16.N04 completed discharge record — CT 3 — external types
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT16.N04, the consumer handoff node “CT 3 — external types” of tactic CT16 (Whole-object exact types). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT16.N04. It must be exactly `CT16`, selecting Whole-object exact types (exact type) as the tactic that owns the consumer handoff step “CT 3 — external types” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “CT 3 — external types”. It must be exactly `CT16.N04` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT16.N04 within tactic CT16 (Whole-object exact types). It must be exactly 4, matching the N04 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT16.N04. It must be exactly `validated`, meaning that the node's certificate, trigger, or other validation obligation has been checked for the consumer handoff obligation “CT 3 — external types”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT16.N04. The array must contain `S-Trig`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “CT 3 — external types”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `S-Trig` to occur in CT16.N04's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that checks that a payload supplies the receiving tactic's trigger, arity, interfaces, and standing hypotheses for the obligation “CT 3 — external types”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT16.N04 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: S-Trig (payloadId, consumerTacticId, expectedArity, componentChecks, standingHypotheses, interfaceChecks, certificateHandleChecks, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `S-Trig` evidence instance at CT16.N04. It must be exactly `S-Trig`, identifying the contract that checks that a payload supplies the receiving tactic's trigger, arity, interfaces, and standing hypotheses; the same instance must supply payloadId, consumerTacticId, expectedArity, componentChecks, standingHypotheses, interfaceChecks, certificateHandleChecks, evidence.

statement.informal: Validate or verify: CT 3 — external types

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
